DECLARATION OF LARALEI S. PARAS ISO MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100041985) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOORE, JOHN
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-02-2019 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND PROPOSED CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS UNDER HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE WARNING THAT IS REQUIRED BY THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTIONS 25249.5-25249.14; THE AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES IS REASONABLE UNDER CALIFORNIA LAW; AND THE PENALTY AMOUNT IS REASONABLE BASED ON THE CRITERIA SET FORTH IN HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7(B)(2). ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-06-2019 Continued To Jul-03-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-02-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff John Moore's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and proposed consent judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warning that is required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

Order and Judgment are signed

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2019 Continued To May-22-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
